title: Orbital Strike Cannon Textures (Item Name)
description: Gives different textures to orbital strike cannons using item names.
body:
## **If you are using any of these mods, use [this](https://modrinth.com/project/RXQBYQz3) instead.**
- [Orbital+](https://modrinth.com/project/Q97V4fVl)
- [Orbital Strike Cannon | DataPack | Mod | Plugin](https://modrinth.com/project/Y1ZEvtor)
- [Orbital Strike Cannon](https://modrinth.com/project/upn22sNG)
- [Nuclear Rods](https://modrinth.com/project/Pq1PwwmG)

This resource pack uses item names to change the texture of (presumably) orbital strike cannons. This is for if you are using an actual cannon or a mod that isn't listed above. Stab shots and nuke shots have different textures.

List of valid names for stab shots (case sensitive):
- Stab Shot
- Stab shot
- stab shot
- stab Shot _(why would you use that?)_
- Stab
- stab

List of valid names for nuke shots (case sensitive):
- Nuke Shot
- Nuke shot
- nuke shot
- nuke Shot _(just why?)_
- Nuke
- nuke

Once again, if you are using any of the mods listed at the top, you should use [this resource pack](https://modrinth.com/project/RXQBYQz3) instead. The list of mods may update over time.
